headline: PSEG To Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results On August 4
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (PSEG) will host its second quarter 2026 earnings call at 11:00 a.m. ET on Tuesday, August 4, during which management will discuss second quarter financial results, financial guidance, capital investments, regulatory activities, and other important matters.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Public Service Enterprise, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains Public Service Enterprise (NYSE:PEG) with a Hold and raises the price target from $88 to $90.

headline: What to Expect From Public Service Enterprise’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Public Service Enterprise is nearing earnings, with Wall Street expecting another solid quarter despite the stock's recent sluggish performance.
